summary: Language-specific URL routing and sitemap testing - All 15 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Home page language URLs (/, /fr, /ru, /hy) load correct content, 2) Language switching on Home page navigates to correct URLs, 3) Direct URL access auto-detects language and sets selector, 4) Armenian transfer page URLs work correctly, 5) Sitemap.xml accessible with 86 URLs and proper hreflang tags, 6) Robots.txt references www.zont.cab/sitemap.xml.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Language-specific URL routing for Home page verified working. homeSeoUrls object in Home.js maps: en='/', fr='/fr', ru='/ru', hy='/hy'. Two useEffects handle bidirectional sync: 1) URL->language detection, 2) language->URL navigation. Sitemap has 86 URLs with hreflang tags for all 4 languages. Armenian transfer URLs follow pattern: /[city]-odanavakayani-transfer.

home_page_language_urls: TEST 1: / loads English content - PASSED (title: 'Premium Airport Transfer')
TEST 2: /fr loads French content - PASSED (title: 'Transfert Aeroport Premium')
TEST 3: /ru loads Russian content - PASSED (title: 'Премиум Трансфер из Аэропорта')
TEST 4: /hy loads Armenian content - PASSED (title: 'Պdelays Օdelays Տdelays')
language_switching_url_navigation: TEST 5: EN->FR switches URL to /fr - PASSED
TEST 6: FR->RU switches URL to /ru - PASSED
TEST 7: RU->HY switches URL to /hy - PASSED
TEST 8: HY->EN switches URL to / - PASSED
direct_url_language_detection: TEST 9: Direct /fr access sets FR flag in selector - PASSED
armenian_transfer_page_urls: TEST 10: /erevan-odanavakayani-transfer loads Armenian Yerevan content - PASSED
TEST 11: /cdg-odanavakayani-transfer loads Armenian CDG content - PASSED
TEST 12: /pariz-odanavakayani-transfer loads Armenian Paris content - PASSED
transfer_page_language_switching: TEST 13: Paris FR->HY navigates to /pariz-odanavakayani-transfer - PASSED
regression_tests: TEST 14: English Paris transfer page works - PASSED
TEST 15: French Paris transfer page works - PASSED

implementation_details.url_to_language_sync: useEffect on location.pathname detects language from URL
implementation_details.language_to_url_sync: useEffect on language navigates to correct URL
